graphs.label: Brute Force Attempts (Failed Logins)
graphs.filter: message contains 'Failed password' or status='failure' or resultType matches '^[1-9]'

graphs.label: DNS Zone Transfer Attempts (AXFR)
graphs.filter: message contains 'AXFR' or message contains 'zone transfer'

graphs.label: Database Privileged Operations
graphs.filter: (serverHost='hanadb-ocsf' or serverHost='oracle-ocsf' or serverHost='attack-target-05') and (message contains 'GRANT' or message contains 'BACKUP' or message contains 'CREATE USER')

graphs.label: Lateral Movement (Internal SMB/RDP/SSH)
graphs.filter: (dstport=445 or dstport=3389 or dstport=22 or dstport=5985) and srcip matches '^(10\.|192\.168\.|172\.)'

graphs.label: C2 Beacon Activity
graphs.filter: dstport=4444 or dstport=8080 or attack matches '(Cobalt|Meterpreter|Beacon)'

graphs.label: Failed Authentication Sources
graphs.filter: resultType matches '^[1-9]' or message contains 'Failed' or message contains 'failure'
